scripts.check:node: node -e "const [major, minor] = process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number); if (major !== 22 || minor < 10) { console.error('Node 22.10+ is required for this project. Run nvm use.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.clean: npm run check:node && npx hardhat clean
scripts.compile: npm run check:node && npx hardhat compile --build-profile production
scripts.test: npm run check:node && npx hardhat test --build-profile production
scripts.deploy: npm run check:node && npx hardhat ignition deploy ./ignition/modules/Web3BookStoreModule.ts --network sepolia --build-profile production
scripts.verifyContract: npm run check:node && npx hardhat verify --network sepolia replace-to-contract-address-here
